description: Style NoteFinally a pair of floaters that understands just what your feet needs. This Yorgio floaters from adidas come equipped with tough felt straps and a curved and grooved footbed (to withstand rough use). The heel region is curved inward so as to prevent mud/sand from entering the sandal. The lugs on the outsole are designed to stay grippy on any terrain - now you know what's the right foot style choice for this monsoon!Product DetailsPerforated synthetic straps for the forefoot, midfoot and ankle loop with Velcro closures and a pull loop at the heel collarA grooved and padded footbedA tough TPU outsole, upraised at the heel, with multidirectional lugs all over
